status: first-pass evidence bundle exported from tracker rows

observations.observation_value: Li Y 2020 indicates delayed microglial depletion can reduce chronic inflammation and remote neurodegeneration while improving neurological recovery in male mice.
observations.normalized_value: li y 2020 indicates delayed microglial depletion can reduce chronic inflammation and remote neurodegeneration while improving neurological recovery in male mice.
observations.statistics_reported: Seed pass; exact statistics not extracted
observations.notes: Carried Module 1A anchor; timing and sex boundary retained.

observations.observation_value: Zhou X 2020 indicates microglia and macrophages can promote corralling, wound compaction, and recovery via Plexin-B2 after SCI.
observations.normalized_value: zhou x 2020 indicates microglia and macrophages can promote corralling, wound compaction, and recovery via plexin-b2 after sci.
observations.statistics_reported: Seed pass; exact statistics not extracted
observations.notes: Important counterweight to simple depletion logic.

observations.outcome_type: Microglia proliferation / tissue preservation / motor recovery
observations.observation_value: Gerber YN 2018 indicates CSF1R inhibition reduces microglia proliferation, promotes tissue preservation, and improves motor recovery after SCI.
observations.normalized_value: gerber yn 2018 indicates csf1r inhibition reduces microglia proliferation, promotes tissue preservation, and improves motor recovery after sci.
observations.statistics_reported: Seed pass; exact statistics not extracted
observations.notes: CSF1R intervention anchor; cell-specificity needs full text.

observations.observation_value: Fan H 2020 links HMGB1-RAGE inhibition to reduced pro-inflammatory macrophage/microglia polarization and neuroprotection after SCI.
observations.normalized_value: fan h 2020 links hmgb1-rage inhibition to reduced pro-inflammatory macrophage/microglia polarization and neuroprotection after sci.
observations.statistics_reported: Seed pass; exact statistics not extracted
observations.notes: Polarization terminology should be upgraded with markers during full-text pass.

observations.observation_value: Zhang C 2022 links macrophage extracellular traps to worsened secondary SCI through LL37, P2X7R, NF-kappaB, and macrophage/microglia polarization.
observations.normalized_value: zhang c 2022 links macrophage extracellular traps to worsened secondary sci through ll37, p2x7r, nf-kappab, and macrophage/microglia polarization.
observations.statistics_reported: Seed pass; exact statistics not extracted
observations.notes: Recent candidate; mechanism needs detailed extraction.

observations.observation_value: Liu J 2024 indicates iPSC-NSC-derived exosomal let-7b-5p improves motor function by modulating microglial/macrophage pyroptosis.
observations.normalized_value: liu j 2024 indicates ipsc-nsc-derived exosomal let-7b-5p improves motor function by modulating microglial/macrophage pyroptosis.
observations.statistics_reported: Seed pass; exact statistics not extracted
observations.notes: Bridge to Module 4 cell-derived products; immune mechanism is primary here.

observations.outcome_type: Histone lactylation / CD8 T-cell recruitment / injury aggravation
observations.observation_value: Ge X 2025 links metabolic reprogramming through histone lactylation in microglia and macrophages to CD8 T lymphocyte recruitment and aggravated SCI.
observations.normalized_value: ge x 2025 links metabolic reprogramming through histone lactylation in microglia and macrophages to cd8 t lymphocyte recruitment and aggravated sci.
observations.statistics_reported: Seed pass; exact statistics not extracted

author_claims.claim_text: Delayed microglial depletion may reduce chronic inflammatory damage when timed after the acute phase.
author_claims.notes: Seed claim; full-text extraction required before saturation-level consensus.

author_claims.claim_text: CSF1R-pathway inhibition is a candidate strategy for reducing microglial proliferation and preserving tissue after SCI.
author_claims.notes: Seed claim; full-text extraction required before saturation-level consensus.

author_claims.claim_text: Microglia and macrophages can be beneficial wound-organizing cells, not only damaging inflammatory cells.
author_claims.notes: Seed claim; full-text extraction required before saturation-level consensus.

author_claims.claim_text: Plexin-B2-linked corralling supports recovery by compacting and containing the SCI wound.
author_claims.notes: Seed claim; full-text extraction required before saturation-level consensus.

author_claims.claim_text: HMGB1-RAGE signaling contributes to pro-inflammatory macrophage/microglia polarization after SCI.
author_claims.notes: Seed claim; full-text extraction required before saturation-level consensus.

author_claims.claim_text: Macrophage extracellular traps can amplify secondary injury through LL37/P2X7R/NF-kappaB signaling.
author_claims.notes: Seed claim; full-text extraction required before saturation-level consensus.

author_claims.claim_text: Polarization claims require marker-level extraction before they can support high-confidence consensus.
author_claims.notes: Seed claim; full-text extraction required before saturation-level consensus.

author_claims.claim_text: Cell-derived exosomes can act as immune-state modulators when their effect is tied to microglial/macrophage pyroptosis.
author_claims.notes: Seed claim; full-text extraction required before saturation-level consensus.

author_claims.claim_text: Cell therapy products should be cross-tagged with immune mechanisms when the reported mechanism is exosomal immune modulation.
author_claims.notes: Seed claim; full-text extraction required before saturation-level consensus.

author_claims.claim_text: Metabolic and epigenetic state changes in myeloid cells may recruit lymphocytes and worsen SCI.
author_claims.notes: Seed claim; full-text extraction required before saturation-level consensus.

author_claims.claim_text: Module 3B currently supports immune-state hypotheses but not saturation-level immune consensus.
author_claims.notes: Seed claim; full-text extraction required before saturation-level consensus.

author_claims.claim_text: Future Module 3 synthesis must stratify by timing, myeloid subtype, depletion versus modulation, and injury phase.
author_claims.notes: Seed claim; full-text extraction required before saturation-level consensus.

boundary_records.interpretation_rule: Microglial depletion can be interpreted differently in acute versus delayed or chronic windows.
Myeloid cells can promote corralling and wound compaction, so broad suppression claims are unsafe.
M1/M2 or pro-inflammatory labels require marker-level and cell-identity extraction.
Exosome or stem-cell products belong in Module 3 when immune-state modulation is the reported mechanism.
Myeloid mechanisms may involve lymphocyte recruitment and cannot be reduced to macrophage-only effects.
Module 3A has not reached saturation and has not completed experiment-level extraction.

consensus_drafts.draft_statement: Seed evidence supports timing-sensitive microglial/CSF1R modulation as a tissue-preservation strategy, but not broad immune depletion as a universal rule.
consensus_drafts.consensus_statement: Seed evidence supports timing-sensitive microglial/CSF1R modulation as a tissue-preservation strategy, but not broad immune depletion as a universal rule.

consensus_drafts.draft_statement: Microglia and macrophages can organize SCI wound containment through corralling and compaction, creating a beneficial myeloid-function boundary.
consensus_drafts.consensus_statement: Microglia and macrophages can organize SCI wound containment through corralling and compaction, creating a beneficial myeloid-function boundary.

consensus_drafts.draft_statement: Danger-signaling and extracellular-trap pathways are plausible pro-inflammatory injury amplifiers but need marker-level full-text extraction.
consensus_drafts.consensus_statement: Danger-signaling and extracellular-trap pathways are plausible pro-inflammatory injury amplifiers but need marker-level full-text extraction.

consensus_drafts.draft_statement: Cell-derived exosome interventions should be treated as immune-modulating therapies when the claimed mechanism is pyroptosis regulation.
consensus_drafts.consensus_statement: Cell-derived exosome interventions should be treated as immune-modulating therapies when the claimed mechanism is pyroptosis regulation.

consensus_drafts.draft_statement: Immune-metabolic reprogramming may couple microglia/macrophages to adaptive immune recruitment after SCI.
consensus_drafts.consensus_statement: Immune-metabolic reprogramming may couple microglia/macrophages to adaptive immune recruitment after SCI.

consensus_drafts.draft_statement: Module 3B should remain a provisional seed consensus until more myeloid, neutrophil, monocyte, and single-cell papers are extracted.
consensus_drafts.consensus_statement: Module 3B should remain a provisional seed consensus until more myeloid, neutrophil, monocyte, and single-cell papers are extracted.
